title: Fix UI freeze during large data rendering
original_text: Fixed UI freeze when rendering large datasets. The main thread was blocked during data processing. Implemented virtual scrolling for large lists. Moved data processing to web workers. Implemented progressive rendering. Added loading indicators during processing. Optimized DOM manipulation. Result: UI remains responsive with 100k+ rows.
expected_subject: fix(ui): implement virtual scrolling for large datasets
expected_body_lines: - Implement virtual scrolling for large lists
- Move data processing to web workers
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(ui): implement virtual scrolling for large datasets"
